title: dichanthelium superatum
intro: Dichanthelium superatum, also known as the prairie bentgrass or bent grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dichanthelium superatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antiseptic properties.
